name: Gurashish Kaur
tagline: Photo Editing & Digital Art — New Delhi, India
headline:
Every image
is negotiable.
heroText: I retouch, composite, and rebuild photographs in Photoshop — pulling apart light, skin, and color until an image says exactly what it needs to.
bio1: I'm Gurashish Kaur, a photo editor and digital artist working primarily in Photoshop. My work sits between repair and invention — sometimes it's a portrait that needs its light rebuilt, sometimes it's a scene that never existed until I put its pieces together.
bio2: I care about images holding up under a close look: skin that still looks like skin, shadows that agree with each other, seams that don't announce themselves.
